# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-API-Key
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-RateLimit-Limit
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
        - X-RateLimit-Reset
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false
      private_network: false

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
      hide_credentials: true
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_body: false
      run_on_preflight: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      second: 10
      minute: 600
      hour: 5000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
      limit_by: consumer

services:
  - name: api-service
    url: http://api-service.internal:8080
    routes:
      - name: api-route
        paths:
          - /api
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
                - https://admin.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-API-Key
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-RateLimit-Limit
                - X-RateLimit-Remaining
                - X-RateLimit-Reset
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false
              private_network: false
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              second: 5
              minute: 300
              hour: 3000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              limit_by: consumer
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
          hide_credentials: true
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_body: false
          run_on_preflight: false
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          second: 20
          minute: 1000
          hour: 10000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          limit_by: consumer
